title: Gospel of Thomas: The Hidden Sayings
description: 114 secret sayings of Jesus, many with no parallel in the canonical gospels.
introduction: 114 secret sayings of Jesus, many with no parallel in the canonical gospels.

translation.text: Whoever finds the interpretation of these sayings will not experience death.
The kingdom is inside of you, and it is outside of you. When you come to know yourselves, then you will be known.
I am the light that is over all things. I am all: from me all came forth, and to me all attained. Split a piece of wood; I am there. Lift up the stone, and you will find me there.
